code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut sum = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut have = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match b
    when Some(c)
      if c >= 48 and c <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
        have = true
      else if c == 45 and not have
        neg = true
      else
        if have
          mut v = val
          if neg
            v = -v
          end
          if v % 2 == 0
            sum = sum + v
          end
        end
        have = false
        neg = false
        val = 0
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if have
    mut v = val
    if neg
      v = -v
    end
    if v % 2 == 0
      sum = sum + v
    end
  end
  println("sum_even=#{sum}")
end
